case_title: 57 TAYLOR I7, LP VS. MARTIN GONGOVA VERA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERA, MARTIN GONGOVA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 57 TAYLOR STREET, #120, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, 94102 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY., LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100185106)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 100183582), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7, LP SERVED NOV-17-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VERA, MARTIN GONGOVA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100184988) AS TO DEFENDANT VERA, MARTIN GONGOVA
